entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency and derivatives exchange launched in 2019 and marketed as London-registered with an Asia-Pacific headquarters in Singapore. In late 2021 it delisted its mainland-China applications, suspended account access and withdrawals, and said core personnel were assisting a police investigation; no verified recovery followed.
entity.notes: HEI uses regulation because the terminal disruption followed mainland-China app removal and a police investigation rather than an announced voluntary exit. The December 10, 2021 date is the first reported loss of login access and the date cited for police action. Geographic claims come from exchange profiles and should be treated as self-described operating locations rather than independently verified corporate domicile.

events.title: AOFEX began operating
events.description: AOFEX began operating as a centralized cryptocurrency and derivatives exchange.
events.notes: The date is month-level and normalized from sources stating that the exchange was established in January 2019.

events.title: AOFEX removed its mainland-China applications
events.description: AOFEX said it completed removal from mainland-China application marketplaces while cooperating with local regulatory requirements.
events.notes: The exact day was not stated; the event is normalized to the end of November 2021.

events.title: Login and withdrawal access failed during police investigation
events.description: Users lost login and withdrawal access, while AOFEX said technical and wallet personnel were assisting a police investigation and no staff were available to restore the servers.
events.notes: The platform described the disruption as maintenance and promised later restoration, but no verified recovery was found.

evidence.title: AOFEX Exchange Rating
evidence.notes: Profile states that AOFEX was established in January 2019, registered in London, and maintained an Asia-Pacific headquarters in Singapore.

evidence.title: AOFEX markets profile
evidence.notes: Historical exchange profile preserves AOFEX's claimed London and Singapore operating identity.

evidence.title: AOFEX exchange under police investigation as crypto platforms exit mainland China
evidence.notes: Report quotes AOFEX notices on mainland-China app removal, police cooperation, suspended logins, and delayed withdrawals.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange users unable to log in or withdraw
evidence.notes: Contemporary reporting states that the website and app became inaccessible from December 10 and users could not withdraw.

evidence.title: AOFEX under police investigation and exchange withdrawal countdown
evidence.notes: English-language report preserves the official-site notice that police took company leadership and technical personnel for investigation on December 10.
